title: Image Resizer
description: Free online image resizer. Resize PNG, JPG, WebP, and GIF images in your browser — no upload required. Set exact dimensions, maintain aspect ratio, and download the resized image instantly.

results.empty: Drop an image or click to upload

howToUse.label: Upload an image
howToUse.description: Click the upload area or drag and drop a PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF file.

howToUse.label: Set dimensions
howToUse.description: Enter the desired width and/or height in pixels. Enable "Lock aspect ratio" to resize proportionally.

howToUse.label: Choose format and quality
howToUse.description: Select the output format (PNG, JPG, WebP) and adjust quality if needed.

howToUse.label: Download
howToUse.description: Click "Download" to save the resized image to your device.

faq.question: Is my image uploaded to a server?
faq.answer: No. All resizing is done in your browser using the Canvas API. Your image never leaves your device.

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: You can upload PNG, JPG, WebP, and GIF files. Output formats are PNG, JPG, and WebP.

faq.question: What does 'Lock aspect ratio' do?
faq.answer: When enabled, changing either width or height automatically adjusts the other dimension to preserve the original proportions. This prevents distortion.

faq.question: What does the quality slider affect?
faq.answer: Quality applies to lossy formats (JPG and WebP). Higher quality produces larger files with better detail; lower quality produces smaller files with some compression artifacts. PNG is lossless and unaffected by the quality setting.

faq.question: Is there a maximum file size?
faq.answer: There is no hard limit, but very large images (over 20 megapixels) may be slow to process in the browser. For best performance, use images under 10 MB.
